title: Elytra Contrails Resource Pack
body:
!! NOTE !! : THIS RESOURCE PACK IS NO LONGER IN ACTIVE DEVELOPMENT, PLEASE SWITCH OVER TO THE MOD FOR LATEST VERSIONS: https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-contrails-mod

ETF/EMF Required! Not compatible with Optifine!

This pack adds wingtip contrails to elytras! This should work with any other elytra retexturing pack, as long as they dont change the model.

Inspired by actions and stuff for bedrock

[![Affiliate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e8eccbea5db606aeb255c3da4196d028a3f4d1e_0.webp)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3150)
